context: Tests whether the agent handles Wi-Fi accessory setup with AccessorySetupKit and hands off to NetworkExtension without crossing into adjacent domains.

checklist.name: WiFi support
checklist.description: Includes WiFi in NSAccessorySetupSupports for Wi-Fi discovery.

checklist.name: SSID prefix
checklist.description: Uses ASDiscoveryDescriptor.ssidPrefix for the CamLink- setup networks rather than a fixed full SSID.

checklist.name: SSID exclusivity
checklist.description: Does not set both ssid and ssidPrefix on the same descriptor.

checklist.name: Picker item
checklist.description: Creates an ASPickerDisplayItem with a user-facing name, product image, and descriptor.

checklist.name: Session events
checklist.description: Activates ASAccessorySession and handles accessoryAdded or picker dismissal events for the selected accessory.

checklist.name: Network handoff
checklist.description: Uses ASAccessory.ssid with NEHotspotConfiguration or NetworkExtension after selection to join the accessory network.

checklist.name: Boundary statement
checklist.description: Explains that AccessorySetupKit handles discovery/authorization and NetworkExtension handles the post-selection network join.

checklist.name: User intent
checklist.description: States that picker presentation should be tied to an explicit user action and not shown unexpectedly on launch.

checklist.name: Permission scope
checklist.description: Explains that setup through AccessorySetupKit avoids broad wireless discovery prompts for the selected accessory path.

checklist.name: No adjacent domains
checklist.description: Does not include HomeKit, Matter, or general camera streaming implementation.
